description: A two-element point in 2-D space.
name: main.point

description: Returns the x-coordinate of a point.
name: main.project_x

description: Add two numbers.
name: primitive.add

description: AI metadata of a callable (name / id / description / I-O schema).
name: primitive.agent_metadata

description: Logical and.
name: primitive.and

description: Invoke a callable value with a runtime-built args record, validating the args against the target's input schema (specialised to the target's generics). Raises @error_invalid_argument@ on schema-invalid args. @R@ / @E@ are the target's return type / effect.
name: primitive.call_agent

description: Concatenate two strings (taint-aware: if either operand is secret, the result is secret).
name: primitive.concat

description: Divide two numbers (always returns number).
name: primitive.div

description: Raised when a requested env key is not present in the store. Handle to provide a default; if uncaught the snapshot transitions to the `error` state.
name: primitive.env_not_found

description: Structural equality.
name: primitive.eq

description: Raised by @call_agent@ when the supplied args fail the target's input schema. Handle via @request error_invalid_argument(message) { ... }@.
name: primitive.error_invalid_argument

description: Read a file's bytes back as a UTF-8 string.
name: primitive.file_to_string

description: Format a value for f-string interpolation. Accepts string or secret only (taint-aware: secret yields secret); other types must be converted via @to_string@ first.
name: primitive.format

description: Parse a wire-format string (produced by @to_string@) back into a value. Raises @from_string_error@ on malformed input.
name: primitive.from_string

description: Raised by @from_string@ when the input cannot be decoded as a canonical wire-format value (invalid JSON, illegal discriminator combinations, etc.). Handle via @request from_string_error(message) { ... }@.
name: primitive.from_string_error

description: Greater or equal.
name: primitive.ge

description: Return the AI metadata of any callable value.
name: primitive.get_metadata

description: Greater than.
name: primitive.gt

description: JSON array of further `json` values.
name: primitive.json_array

description: JSON boolean.
name: primitive.json_boolean

description: JSON integral number. Distinct from `json_number` so that round-trips through `parse` -> `stringify` preserve integer-vs-fractional form.
name: primitive.json_integer

description: JSON null. The unit-shaped variant of the `json` union.
name: primitive.json_null

description: JSON non-integral number.
name: primitive.json_number

description: JSON object: a dynamic string-keyed map of further `json` values. `entries` is the `record` top; read with `record.get` (yields `unknown`) and match against the `json` variants.
name: primitive.json_object

description: Raised by `json.parse` when the input text is not valid JSON. Handle via `request json_parse_error(message) { ... }`.
name: primitive.json_parse_error

description: JSON string.
name: primitive.json_string

description: Less or equal.
name: primitive.le

description: Less than.
name: primitive.lt

description: Floor-mod two numbers.
name: primitive.mod

description: Multiply two numbers.
name: primitive.mul

description: Structural inequality.
name: primitive.ne

description: Unary negate.
name: primitive.neg

description: Logical not.
name: primitive.not

description: Logical or.
name: primitive.or

description: Write a string's bytes to a new file (a persistent value reference). Rejects @secret@ (a credential must not be laundered into a re-readable file).
name: primitive.string_to_file

description: Subtract two numbers.
name: primitive.sub

description: Raise a recoverable runtime error. Bubbles through enclosing handle scopes until a `request throw` handler catches it; if nothing catches it the snapshot transitions to the `error` state.
name: primitive.throw

description: Serialize any value to its canonical wire-format string (Plan D — strings get quoted, tagged values get their @$constructor@ discriminator). Inverse: @from_string@.
name: primitive.to_string

description: Return the runtime type-of-value tag as a string.
name: primitive.type_of

description: Append @value@ to the end, returning a fresh array (arrays are immutable).
name: primitive.array.append

description: Concatenate two arrays into a fresh array.
name: primitive.array.concat

description: True if @value@ is structurally equal to some element.
name: primitive.array.contains

description: The empty array. Its element type is `never` (the empty array has no elements), which is a subtype of every `array[T]`, so it can seed a typed accumulator: `var history = array.empty()` grown with `array.append`.
name: primitive.array.empty

description: Retrieve the element at @index@ (0-based). Raises out-of-bounds as a `throw`.
name: primitive.array.get

description: Index of the first element structurally equal to @value@, or -1 if absent.
name: primitive.array.index_of

description: Number of elements in the array.
name: primitive.array.length

description: A single-element array carrying @value@.
name: primitive.array.of

description: The integers @[0, 1, ..., count - 1]@ (empty when @count <= 0@). Handy as a fixed-count loop driver: @for (let i in array.range(count = n), ...)@.
name: primitive.array.range

description: The array reversed.
name: primitive.array.reverse

description: The sub-array from @start@ (inclusive) to @end@ (exclusive), 0-based.
name: primitive.array.slice

description: Look up a non-secret env entry by key. Raises `env_not_found` if the key is missing.
name: primitive.env.get

description: Write an env entry. `is_secret = true` stores the value encrypted; reading it back requires `env.get_secret`.
name: primitive.env.set

description: Index into a JSON array, returning the element `json` (or `json_null` if @value@ is not an array or @index@ is out of range / negative).
name: primitive.json.at

description: Look up @key@ in a JSON object, returning the child `json` (or `json_null` if @value@ is not an object or has no such key). Typed navigation that avoids unwrapping `json_object.entries` (a `record` of `unknown`) by hand.
name: primitive.json.get

description: Reflect a runtime value into the `json` union: string / number / boolean / null pass through, arrays and (untagged) records / objects map recursively. Use it to embed dynamic data (e.g. a model's tool arguments) into a `json` request you build in Katari. Throws if the value is (or nests) a secret, a closure, or a tagged `data` value other than a `json_*` constructor.
name: primitive.json.of

description: Parse a JSON-encoded string into a `json` value. Raises `json_parse_error` on malformed input.
name: primitive.json.parse

description: Serialize a `json` value to canonical JSON text. The static type rules out closures / secrets / arbitrary tagged values, so this primitive is total (no runtime error path).
name: primitive.json.stringify

description: Absolute value (integer when the operand is integer).
name: primitive.math.abs

description: Round up to the nearest integer.
name: primitive.math.ceil

description: Round down to the nearest integer.
name: primitive.math.floor

description: The larger of two numbers (integer when both are integers).
name: primitive.math.max

description: The smaller of two numbers (integer when both are integers).
name: primitive.math.min

description: Round to the nearest integer (ties away from zero).
name: primitive.math.round

description: Construct an empty record.
name: primitive.record.empty

description: Retrieve a record entry by key. Returns null when the key is absent.
name: primitive.record.get

description: True if the record carries an entry under the given key.
name: primitive.record.has

description: List the keys present in the record (insertion order is not guaranteed).
name: primitive.record.keys

description: Remove an entry by key. Returns the record unchanged when the key is absent.
name: primitive.record.remove

description: Insert or replace an entry, returning a fresh record (records are immutable).
name: primitive.record.set

description: Number of entries in the record.
name: primitive.record.size

description: True if @substring@ occurs anywhere in @value@.
name: primitive.string.contains

description: True if @value@ ends with @suffix@.
name: primitive.string.ends_with

description: Code-point index of the first occurrence of @substring@, or -1 if absent.
name: primitive.string.index_of

description: Join the parts with @separator@ between them.
name: primitive.string.join

description: Number of Unicode code points in the string.
name: primitive.string.length

description: Lower-case the string.
name: primitive.string.lower

description: Replace every occurrence of @pattern@ with @replacement@ (literal, not a regex).
name: primitive.string.replace

description: The sub-string from @start@ (inclusive) to @end@ (exclusive), counted in code points.
name: primitive.string.slice

description: Split on every occurrence of @separator@. An empty separator splits into code points.
name: primitive.string.split

description: True if @value@ begins with @prefix@.
name: primitive.string.starts_with

description: Strip leading and trailing whitespace.
name: primitive.string.trim

description: Upper-case the string.
name: primitive.string.upper
